title: シンボリルドルフ登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, Symboli Rudolf, the Emperor, is slated to
make her racing debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The news spreads through the racing world like
wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see the news? We're finally going to see
Symboli Rudolf race!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: I totally did! I hear she's super strong. I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
It may be early, but expectations are high for the
Emperor. Would it be fair to say that the Classic
Triple Crown is a shoe-in?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
It certainly would! The real question is, how far
can she go from there? This is one heck of a
story, and we'll be there every step of the way
with the hottest scoops!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Have you seen those reporters outside? I bet
they're all here for the president.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
And she's only just announced her debut... Only
President Rudolf could pull that off.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Right? That's our ace for you. I wanna be just like
her someday...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! If we follow her, we can't go wrong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both inside and outside of the academy, it seems
like the Emperor is all anybody can talk about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as the expectations mount and pressure
builds, the Umamusume of the hour...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, everyone. You're all bright-eyed
and bushy-tailed today, I see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...seems completely unperturbed.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Ah! Good morning, President!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
We're really sorry! We shouldn't have been
talking behind your back!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's quite all right. If anything, what you said was
rather flattering.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you follow me, you can't go wrong... If that is
truly how you feel, then I couldn't be more
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Rest assured, I won't betray your trust. You have
my word that I will lead you straight and true.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I only ask that you continue to place your faith in
me. Can you do that?

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: O-of course!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm pleased to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now then. Trainer, I have kept you waiting long
enough. Shall we?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I have something to say. Would you
hear me out?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We're getting ready for my debut race, but it
goes without saying that my sights are set far
higher.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My true goal is to create a world in which all
Umamusume can live in bliss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But such a paradise won't come about on its own.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Since the dawn of time, people have attempted
to change the world for the better. And time after
time, they have chosen the same method.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Namely, to install an exceptional leader who can
guide the masses. Every nation in every age has
come to this same conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And the one to guide the Umamusume through
the pain and strife of the racing world...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...will be me, Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That being said, I am yet a novice. My voice holds
no more weight than a whisper in the wind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thus, my first task is to prove myself an
Emperor—a ruler whose strength no one can deny.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But how can an Emperor show that she is worthy
of her place?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let me give you a hint. It is something one wears
on their head. Or does that make it too simple?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. A crown is a clear and visible symbol of
might and majesty.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And what crown better suits an Umamusume than
one bestowed on victors on the track?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and the
Kikuka Sho—the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To claim these titles is the least I must
accomplish. I will do so at any cost.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But I will not stop there. I swear I will work myself
to the bone to claim future victories.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So I must ask you...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Are you prepared to join me in pursuit of this
grand and foolhardy dream?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes bore straight into me, telling me in no
uncertain terms that half-hearted resolve won't
cut it here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her goal is far too lofty and her burden far too
weighty for one person to bear alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's all the more reason I want to help her on
her journey. Ever since the day she first chose me,
I've been ready for this!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ha! A fine reply.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. I know you won't let me
down.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, then. That's quite enough serious talk, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's another reason I called you here today. I
don't suppose you like coffee?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We'll have few opportunities to talk at length
after my debut, so we ought make the most of the
time we have now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What say we discuss things in more detail over an
aromatic cup of coffee?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We will still have to watch the time, of course. I
wouldn't want to stay out too... latte.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Get it? Latte? Late? Hmmm, perhaps that was a
little forced...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so Symboli Rudolf and I embark on our
grand endeavor!
